qry:select.name: QRY_PERSONAL
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT per01.d_ape_y_nom, per02.e_numero_legajo, per02.oi_personal_emp, per02.oi_empresa, org03.d_empresa FROM PER01_PERSONAL as per01, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as per02 , ORG03_EMPRESAS AS org03 JOIN per01.oi_personal INNER per02.oi_personal, per02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa WHERE per02.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_EVALUACIONES
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT eva01_eventos.c_evento, eva02_evaluacion.oi_evaluacion, eva01_eventos.f_desde, eva02_evaluacion.oi_evento FROM eva02_evaluacion, eva01_eventos JOIN eva02_evaluacion.oi_evento INNER eva01_eventos.oi_evento WHERE eva02_evaluacion.oi_personal_emp= {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY f_desde ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_COMPETENCIAS
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT org21.d_competencia, eva02.oi_competencia FROM EVA02_COM_EVALU as eva02, ORG21_COMPETENCIAS as org21, EVA02_EVALUACION as eva02e JOIN eva02e.oi_evaluacion INNER eva02.oi_evaluacion, eva02.oi_competencia INNER org21.oi_competencia WHERE eva02e.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} GROUP BY org21.d_competencia, eva02.oi_competencia
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_EVA_COMP
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT eva01_eventos.c_evento, eva02_evaluacion.oi_evaluacion, eva01_eventos.f_desde, eva02_evaluacion.oi_evento, {%=#PARAM:@oi_competencia%} as oi_competencia FROM eva02_evaluacion, eva01_eventos JOIN eva02_evaluacion.oi_evento INNER eva01_eventos.oi_evento WHERE eva02_evaluacion.oi_personal_emp= {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} ORDER BY f_desde ASC ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_RESULTADOS
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT eva02e.oi_evaluacion, eva02.c_nivel_resultado FROM EVA02_COM_EVALU as eva02, EVA02_EVALUACION as eva02e JOIN eva02e.oi_evaluacion INNER eva02.oi_evaluacion WHERE eva02e.oi_personal_emp = {#PARAMIN:@oi_personal_emp} AND eva02.oi_competencia = {#PARAM:@oi_competencia} AND eva02.oi_evaluacion = {#PARAM:@oi_evaluacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: SECURITY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT NMD_SECURITY.policy FROM NMD_SECURITY WHERE NMD_SECURITY.class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.LegajoEmpresa.PERSONAL_EMP\' AND NMD_SECURITY.id={#PARAM:@oi_personal_emp}')/ROWS/ROW
